ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* The part number assigned to the item */,
  "nsn" TEXT /* The National Stock Number for the part */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the part in inventory */,
  "rfq_status" TEXT /* Status of the Request for Quote (RFQ) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the part belongs */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the part is stored */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the quantity */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of inspections */,
  "critical_level" INTEGER /* Critical level for stock alerts */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for automatic reordering */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for replenishment */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the part */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the part */,
  "part_lifetime" INTEGER /* Expected lifetime of the part */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period for the part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES part_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rfqs" (
  "rfq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RFQ */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part for which the RFQ is issued */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the RFQ was requested */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier to whom the RFQ is sent */,
  "quote_status" TEXT /* Current status of the quote */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the RFQ */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the RFQ */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the RFQ */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rfq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfqs_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfqs_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the supplier based on past performance */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the supplier */,
  "delivery_lead_time" TEXT /* Average delivery lead time */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the supplier's products */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nsn_parts" (
  "nsn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NSN part */,
  "nsn_number" TEXT /* The National Stock Number for the part */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the NSN part */,
  "part_ids" TEXT /* Array of part IDs associated with this NSN */,
  "part_lifetime" INTEGER /* Expected lifetime of parts associated with the NSN */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period for parts associated with the NSN */,
  "critical_level" INTEGER /* Critical level for stock alerts for parts associated with the NSN */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for automatic reordering for parts associated with the NSN */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nsn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nsn_parts_nsn_number FOREIGN KEY ("nsn_number") REFERENCES parts ("nsn")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory transaction */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., order, shipment, adjustment) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity involved in the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the transaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_log_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement" (
  "procurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement order */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier from whom the part is ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the order */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the order */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "logistics_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the logistics provider for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon for the category */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES part_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part relationship */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary part */,
  "related_part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related part */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., substitute, accessory) */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the relationship */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_relations_related_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_relations_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_clearance" (
  "clearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security clearance level */,
  "clearance_level" TEXT /* Level of security clearance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security clearance level */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "user_ids" TEXT /* Array of user IDs who have this clearance level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clearance_id")
)
